name: TAO Range Failure Reacceptance v2
thesis: In choppy TAO 4h conditions, false excursions from balance can mean-revert once price re-enters value, but the structure needs broader acceptance bands than the prior sparse batch. The edge should come from repeated value reacceptance, not exact one-bar reversal timing.
edge_mechanism: range failure mean reversion after broader value reacceptance
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward testing again shows zero trades on valid data or weak blind-window participation.

long: Take profit: EMA_20 or 1.4 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
short: Take profit: EMA_20 or 1.4 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
